tool.name: create_skill
tool.description:
Scaffold a new Ziro skill — markdown file with frontmatter (name, description, mitre_techniques, kill_chain_phases, related_skills) + body.
After creation the skill is immediately discoverable via load_skill / read_skill — no restart. Panel wizard sends these calls directly.
Categories: vulnerabilities / frameworks / protocols / cloud / technologies / tooling / reconnaissance / analysis / scan_modes / threat_actors.

parameter.name: body
parameter.description: Full markdown body of the skill.

tool.name: list_skill_categories
tool.description: List available skill categories with skill counts.
